turns.en: Hi there! What can I get for you today?
A grande latte, please.

turns.cn: 要加什么奶？全脂、脱脂还是燕麦奶？
turns.en: What kind of milk? Whole, skim, or oat?
Oat milk, please. And light ice.
Would you like any syrup in that?
Vanilla syrup, please.
For here or to go?
To go, thanks.

title: Working at a Cafe
scene: 你在咖啡店用笔记本电脑工作，需要更多插座。

turns.cn: 打扰一下，请问有带插座的座位吗？
turns.en: Excuse me, is there a seat near an outlet?
The high-top tables along the wall have outlets.

turns.cn: 太好了。我还可以续杯吗？
turns.en: Perfect. Can I also get a refill?

turns.cn: 当然可以，同一种咖啡吗？
turns.en: Sure. Same drink?
Yes, another Americano, please.

turns.cn: 马上来。需要加点吃的吗？
turns.en: Coming right up. Would you like anything to eat?
I'll have a blueberry scone.

title: Meeting a Friend
scene: 你和朋友约在咖啡店见面。

turns.en: Hey! Long time no see!
I know! How have you been?
Pretty good. I just started a new job.
Congratulations! What do you do?

turns.cn: 在一家科技公司做产品经理。
turns.en: I'm a product manager at a tech company.

turns.cn: 太棒了！要不要再来一杯？
turns.en: That's awesome! Want to grab another round?
Sure, my treat!
I'll get it next time!

title: Wrong Order
scene: 店员给你的饮品不对，你去柜台说明。

turns.cn: 不好意思，我点的是热拿铁，这是冰的。
turns.en: Sorry, I ordered a hot latte, but this is iced.

turns.cn: 非常抱歉，我马上给您重做。
turns.en: I'm so sorry. I'll remake it for you right away.
No worries. Thank you.
And that was with oat milk, right?
Yes, and no sugar, please.

turns.cn: 好了，这杯是您的，抱歉让您久等。
turns.en: Here you go. Sorry for the wait.
Thanks, it tastes great!

title: Studying at the Cafe
scene: 你在咖啡店自习，需要安静环境。

turns.cn: 请问哪个区域比较安静？
turns.en: Which area is the quietest for studying?

turns.cn: 靠里侧的高桌区人少一些。
turns.en: The high-top tables in the back are usually quieter.

turns.cn: 我待两个小时，需要再点一杯吗？
turns.en: I'll be here about two hours. Do I need to order again?

turns.cn: 高峰时段建议每小时点一杯。
turns.en: During busy hours, we ask for one drink per hour.
Okay. I'll start with an Americano.
The Wi-Fi password is on your receipt.
Thanks. This place is really cozy.

title: Wrong Drink
scene: 店员端上的咖啡不是你点的，你需要礼貌说明。

turns.cn: 不好意思，我点的是燕麦拿铁。
turns.en: Excuse me, I ordered an oat milk latte.

turns.cn: 非常抱歉，这杯是全脂牛奶的。
turns.en: I'm sorry. This one was made with whole milk.

turns.cn: 我对乳制品过敏，能重做一杯吗？
turns.en: I'm allergic to dairy. Could you remake it?

turns.cn: 当然，马上为您重做，请稍等。
turns.en: Of course. I'll remake it right away.
That's fine. No rush.

turns.cn: 新的好了，这杯请您不用付钱。
turns.en: Here's the new one. Please don't pay for the mistake.
Thank you. I appreciate it.
